payload.label: oven
payload.long_description: Close-up, front-facing brown enamel oven showing the upper oven door with a rectangular glass window and a white printed kitchen towel draped over the horizontal handle; a lower storage drawer is visible beneath and the metal finish shows scuffs and wear, the crop is partially edge-cut and the oven appears photographed at roughly 0.8 m from the camera.
